settings.title: AVENTUS
settings.subtitle: Creed   ·   Eau de Parfum
settings.tagline: Named for Napoleon's victories, Aventus is the benchmark — smoky birch and crisp pineapple create a scent so recognizable it's become a cultural shorthand for success.
settings.notes_top: Bergamot, Black Currant, Apple, Pink Pepper
settings.best_for:
Year-round — true all-season icon
Black-tie & formal events
Date night
Power meetings
First impressions
settings.protip_body: Two sprays — chest and lower neck. Aventus evolves dramatically: fresh and fruity up top, deep and smoky in the dry-down. Pairs with Creed Green Irish Tweed for a greener, more daytime feel.
settings.vibe_tags:
Bold
Smoky
Iconic
Year-Round
Power Move
